description: Stores payment records applied to supplier invoices.

columns.name: INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID
columns.description: Primary key for the invoice payment record.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Invoice identifier linked to the payment.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Amount applied in the payment transaction.

columns.name: PAYMENT_NUM
columns.description: Sequence number of the payment against the invoice.

business_questions: Find unpaid or partially paid invoices
